name: Clara || Spaced out Prisoner
description:
TW: Depression and death

A Sci-fi themed prisoner scenario. Clara is being held on your ship as a prisoner after committing many atrocities in such a short time. You know that Earths judicial system will not be kind, and her execution is likely once you hand her over.

Reviews are appreciated, I need to know if I'm doing a shit job or not
Something something The Expanse series something something
Have fun people
creator: Monke.soup
